title: Executor cache key includes modeId
description:
Ensure the executor cache key includes modeId so that different modes get different executor instances (with the correct filtered tool set). getExecutorForModel (or equivalent) must accept conversation context and use (modelId, modeId) as cache key; when mode changes, next message gets a new executor with the new tool set.

Scope: Executor creation/cache site(s); cache key shape.
Acceptance: Cache key is (modelId, modeId); changing conversation mode causes new executor to be built with tools for the new mode; no explicit invalidation required.

Completion: auto-advance (backend only).

title: Filter tools by permission: deny removed, ask marked, pass allow+ask
description:
In getToolsForAgent(), after resolving effective permission per tool: remove tools with 'deny'; mark tools with 'ask' for runtime approval (metadata or separate list for Phase 9); pass only allowed and ask tools to the agent. Denied tools must not be in the set returned to the executor.

Scope: getToolsForAgent() after resolution step; tool list returned to executor.
Acceptance: Executor receives only allow + ask tools; deny tools excluded; ask tools identifiable for future runtime approval.

Completion: auto-advance (backend only). If tool list visibly changes in chat (e.g. fewer tools in a restricted mode), consider review-required; per backlog Phase 8 is mostly backend with no new UI—tag as auto-advance.

title: Resolve effective permission per tool (mode hierarchy)
description:
Implement permission resolution per tool using the mode's hierarchy: category → connection type → connection → tool (tool override ?? connection ?? connection type ?? category default). Return allow/ask/deny for each tool. Use tool metadata (scope, access, connectionType, connection) and mode definition. No global permission store—conversation's mode only.

Scope: New or existing permission resolution helper; called from getToolsForAgent() after mode is loaded.
Acceptance: For each registered tool, effective permission (allow|ask|deny) is computed from the mode; hierarchy rules applied correctly.

Completion: auto-advance (backend only).

title: getToolsForAgent: load conversation mode from registry
description:
Inside getToolsForAgent(), load the conversation's mode from the mode registry using conversation.modeId. If modeId is null (e.g. legacy conversation), treat as Full mode (or use default); optional backfill on write per backlog.

Scope: getToolsForAgent() implementation; mode registry getMode/list already exist.
Acceptance: Mode is loaded by modeId; null modeId handled (Full or default); no new UI.

Completion: auto-advance (backend only).

title: getToolsForAgent: accept conversation context (modeId)
description:
Extend getToolsForAgent() signature to accept conversation context (at least modeId). Update all call sites to pass the conversation so the chat's mode can be applied later. No filtering yet—passthrough behavior unchanged.

Scope: getToolsForAgent() and its callers (executor creation path).
Acceptance: Signature accepts conversation (or { modeId }); callers pass it; existing tests/behavior unchanged.

Completion: auto-advance (backend only, no UI).

title: Tool Permission System
description: Epic for tool-permission-system backlog. Phases 1-7 done; Phase 8 wires mode permissions into getToolsForAgent() and executor cache. Backlog: docs/product/backlog/tool-permission-system.md
